'''Buudro''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] customs inspector found aboard ''[[Imperial Customs Frigate 517]]''. He once boarded a ship orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reginard]] where he was escorted by two [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. They questioned all members aboard the ship but were eventually convinced to leave the [[Star system/Legends|system]] before they managed to discover the secret [[Reginard Base]].<ref name="Death" />
